title: artemisia divaricata
intro: Artemisia divaricata, also known as Mongolian wormwood, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Artemisia divaricata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to have antimicrobial and antiviral effects. This plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health.
